<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\CodeCleaner; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\Variable; use Psy\Exception\RuntimeException; /** * Validate that the user input does not reference the `$__psysh__` variable. */ class LeavePsyshAlonePass extends CodeCleanerPass { /** * Validate that the user input does not reference the `$__psysh__` variable. * * @throws RuntimeException if the user is messing with $__psysh__ * * @param Node $node * * @return int|Node|null Replacement node (or special return value) */ public function enterNode(Node $node) { if ($node instanceof Variable && $node->name === '__psysh__') { throw new RuntimeException('Don\'t mess with $__psysh__; bad things will happen'); } return null; } }
